apex: Why do most personal OKRs get abandoned by week 3?

nodes.text: Goals are framed as outcomes, not weekly behaviors
No review ritual on the calendar (node with no citation — tests empty meta)

roots.title: No recurring review loop (process gap)
roots.action: Put a 10-min weekly review on the calendar

constraint.statement: Located: a missing review loop. Cheap to fix.

census.bottomLine: All inference/hypothesis — a map, not a verdict. (Single-root case: convergence map shows just the constraint.)
